ideas.title: breath pacer
ideas.description: 4-7-8 breath circle: expand on inhale, hold, contract on exhale. clear phase labels.

ideas.title: 5-4-3-2-1 grounding
ideas.description: the 5-4-3-2-1 senses grounding exercise — five things you see, four hear, etc. one prompt per step, tap to advance.

ideas.title: box breathing
ideas.description: 4-4-4-4 box breathing, animated as a square outline that fills each side.

ideas.title: intention card
ideas.description: tap to draw one of ~30 short intentions for the next hour. typeset on a soft card.

ideas.title: still pond
ideas.description: click a still water surface to drop ripples; ambient, no goal. soft palette.

ideas.title: gratitude bead
ideas.description: tap a bead to drop one — fills a quiet column. silent counter of how many today.

ideas.title: tea timer
ideas.description: pick a tea (3 types), countdown with a gentle filling teacup visual. visual ding at zero.
